calls.name: set_macro_plan

args.summary: 14-week plan building from 40km to 55km peak, periodized for sub-1:45 half marathon on 2026-10-04. Phases: Base (volume + strength), Build (threshold + race-specific endurance), Taper (sharpening), Race. Strength maintained 2x/week; runs scheduled to avoid heavy legs the day after lower-body sessions.

phases.name: Base
phases.focus: Aerobic endurance + general strength. Weekly volume ramps from 40km to 48km. Strength 2x/week (lower/upper).
phases.notes: Long runs 16-18km. Easy runs @ 5:40-6:00/km. One threshold session/week (e.g. 5-6×1km @ 4:45/km).

phases.name: Build
phases.focus: Race-specific endurance + lactate threshold. Weekly volume 50-55km. Strength 2x/week (lower-body RPE capped at 6 to protect run quality).
phases.notes: Long runs 18-22km with race-pace segments (e.g. 5km @ 4:58/km). Threshold sessions (e.g. 3×3km @ 4:50/km).

phases.name: Taper
phases.focus: Sharpening + recovery. Volume drops to 30km/week. Strength 1x/week (maintenance, RPE ≤5).
phases.notes: Long run 12-14km. Race-pace work (e.g. 3×2km @ 4:58/km) early in taper.

phases.name: Race
phases.focus: Half marathon — sub-1:45 (4:58/km).
phases.notes: Race day!

phases.name: Recovery
phases.focus: Easy running + mobility. Volume 20-25km/week. Strength 1x/week (light).

calls.name: set_weekly_plan

args.summary: Base phase week 1: aerobic endurance + strength. Volume 40km. Long run 16km. Strength 2x (lower/upper).

days.title: Easy run
days.detail: 6km easy @ 5:40-6:00/km. Keep HR in Z2 (139-152 bpm).

days.title: Lower body — squat focus
days.detail: Squats 4×6 @ RPE 7, Romanian deadlifts 3×8, calf raises 3×12. Core: planks 3×45 sec.

days.title: Recovery
days.detail: 30 min cross-training (swim/cycle) OR rest. Keep HR <139 bpm.

days.title: Threshold session
days.detail: 6×1km @ 4:45/km (90 sec recovery jog). HR Z4 (161-170 bpm) by final rep. Warm-up/cool-down 2km.

days.title: Upper body + core
days.detail: Bench press 4×6 @ RPE 6, bent-over rows 3×8, shoulder press 3×8. Core: Russian twists 3×20, leg raises 3×12.

days.title: Long run
days.detail: 16km @ 5:50-6:00/km. HR Z2 (139-152 bpm). Walk breaks every 5km to stretch.

calls.name: set_plan_instructions

args.instructions:
1. Strength train 2x/week (lower/upper). Avoid hard/long runs the day after lower-body sessions (schedule easy/recovery).
2. Keep weekly volume between 38-55km; prioritize consistency over spikes.
3. Race-pace work (4:58/km) begins in Build phase (late July).
4. Taper starts 3 weeks out from race (2026-09-14).

calls.raw:
{"instructions": "1. Strength train 2x/week (lower/upper). Avoid hard/long runs the day after lower-body sessions (schedule easy/recovery).
2. Keep weekly volume between 38-55km; prioritize consistency over spikes.
3. Race-pace work (4:58/km) begins in Build phase (late July).
4. Taper starts 3 weeks out from race (2026-09-14)."}

args.summary: Build week, ~40km. Adjusted to move tempo run to Thursday for better recovery after Tuesday's intervals.

days.title: Rest
days.detail: Rest day.

days.title: 5×1km @ threshold
days.detail: 5×1km at threshold pace (4:50–5:00/km) with 400m jog recovery between intervals. Warm up and cool down 1–2km.

days.title: Easy 6km
days.detail: Easy run at 5:30–6:00/km. Keep HR in Z2.

days.title: Tempo 6km
days.detail: 6km tempo at 4:40–4:50/km (threshold pace). Warm up and cool down 1–2km.

days.title: Lower body — squat focus
days.detail: Lower-body strength session. Focus on squats, 3–4 sets of 5–8 reps. Include accessory work (lunges, leg curls, calf raises). RPE 7.

days.title: Easy 5km
days.detail: Easy run at 5:30–6:00/km. Keep HR in Z2.

days.title: Long run 18km
days.detail: Long run at 5:45–6:15/km. Keep HR in Z2. Focus on endurance and fueling practice.

calls.name: set_macro_plan

args.summary: 16-week plan building aerobic base, then adding tempo and race-pace work to peak for a sub-1:45 half marathon on Oct 4. Strength maintained 2x/week, scheduled to avoid conflict with hard runs.

phases.name: Base
phases.focus: Increase weekly volume to 50km, maintain easy pace
phases.notes: Focus on consistency, no hard efforts

phases.name: Build
phases.focus: Introduce tempo runs and intervals, increase intensity
phases.notes: One tempo, one interval session weekly

phases.name: Peak
phases.focus: Race-pace work, longer tempo runs, max volume
phases.notes: Peak at 58km in week of Sept 15

phases.name: Taper
phases.focus: Reduce volume, maintain intensity, sharpen
phases.notes: Volume drops 40% over 3 weeks

phases.name: Race
phases.focus: Half marathon race day

phases.name: Recovery
phases.focus: Active recovery, no structured training
phases.notes: Light walking, stretching, easy walks

calls.name: set_macro_plan

args.summary: Periodized plan to peak for a sub‑1:45 half marathon on 2026‑10‑04, balancing gradual mileage increase with strength work.

phases.name: Base
phases.focus: Build aerobic endurance, establish consistent mileage, maintain strength 2×/week
phases.notes: Increase weekly volume ~5% per week, include strides and short hill work.

phases.name: Build
phases.focus: Add tempo and interval sessions, extend long runs, sharpen at goal pace
phases.notes: 1× weekly tempo 20 min Z3, 1× interval session, long run up to 18 km.

phases.name: Peak
phases.focus: Peak volume and race‑specific intensity, longest long run
phases.notes: Long run 20 km with last 5 km at goal pace, race‑pace intervals 3×2 km.

phases.name: Taper
phases.focus: Reduce volume, keep intensity, sharpen
phases.notes: Week 1 volume ~20% down, week 2 ~40% down; maintain short tempo.

phases.name: Race
phases.focus: Half‑marathon race day
phases.notes: Goal pace 4:58 min/km.

phases.name: Recovery
phases.focus: Active recovery, easy runs
phases.notes: Easy runs 5‑8 km, light strength work.

calls.name: set_weekly_plan

args.summary: Base phase – build aerobic base, keep strength 2×/week

days.title: 16 km long run
days.detail: Steady aerobic run at 5:55 min/km, Z2 HR 150, focus on consistent pacing.

days.title: 6 km easy run
days.detail: Recovery run at ~6:10 min/km, Z2, keep HR low, relaxed effort.

days.title: Lower‑body strength
days.detail: Squat‑focus session, 3 × 8 reps, RPE 7, core work included.

days.title: 8 km easy run with strides
days.detail: Run at ~6:00 min/km, Z2, finish with 4 × 100 m strides at fast but controlled pace.

days.title: Upper‑body strength
days.detail: Pull‑focus (rows, pull‑ups), 3 × 10 reps, RPE 6, light core work.

days.title: 8 km easy run
days.detail: Easy pace ~5:40 min/km, Z2, HR ~145, relaxed effort.

days.title: Rest / active recovery
days.detail: Full rest or optional light cross‑training (e.g., 30 min easy bike).

calls.name: set_macro_plan

args.summary: Progressive 10K specific plan building aerobic base, then speed work, peaking for sub‑50 on 8 Nov.

phases.name: Base
phases.focus: Build aerobic volume, steady easy runs, introduce light strides
phases.notes: Maintain 2 strength sessions per week, keep acute:chronic ~1.0

phases.name: Build
phases.focus: Add tempo runs and interval sessions, increase weekly mileage
phases.notes: Strength focus shifts to maintenance, keep one lower‑body day

phases.name: Peak
phases.focus: Race‑specific pace work, sharpen speed, reduce volume slightly
phases.notes: Last hard interval 2 weeks before race, taper begins after

phases.name: Taper
phases.focus: Maintain intensity, cut volume, recover for race day
phases.notes: Light strength, focus on mobility

phases.name: Race
phases.focus: Race day execution

args.summary: Base phase: build volume, easy runs, introduce strides, maintain strength.

days.title: Rest
days.detail: Full rest after long run, focus on mobility and hydration.

days.title: 8 km easy
days.detail: Steady pace ~5:45/km, stay in HR zone Z2 (139-152 bpm).

days.title: Upper body – push/pull
days.detail: Full-body circuit focusing on chest, back, shoulders. RPE 6-7, keep legs light.

days.title: 8 km easy + strides
days.detail: Run 8 km at ~5:45/km, finish with 6×100 m strides (fast, relaxed). HR in Z2.

days.title: 6 km recovery
days.detail: Very easy pace ~6:10/km, HR Z1‑Z2, focus on good form.

days.title: 5×1000 m @ 4:45/km
days.detail: Warm‑up 2 km easy, then 5×1 km at 4:45/km with 2‑min jog recovery, cool‑down 2 km easy. Aim HR Z4 on reps.

days.title: 18 km long run
days.detail: Steady long run at ~5:55/km, stay in HR zone Z2‑Z3, practice fueling.

calls.name: set_macro_plan

args.summary: 14-week half marathon build from ~40km to a peak of 50-55km. Periodized: Base (4 wks) → Build (6 wks) → Peak (2 wks) → Taper (1 wk) → Race. Maintains 2x/week strength training throughout, with runs arranged around gym days to avoid hard/long runs clashing with lower-body fatigue.

phases.name: Base
phases.focus: Build aerobic endurance and consolidate weekly volume at 40-45km. One threshold session + long run each week.
phases.notes: Long runs 16-18km. Threshold work at ~4:45/km. Keep strength 2x/week.

phases.name: Build
phases.focus: Progress volume to 45-52km. Introduce race-pace work (4:55-5:00/km) and longer threshold blocks. Long runs extend to 18-21km.
phases.notes: Key sessions: race-pace tempo runs, progressive long runs, and continued threshold intervals. Strength shifts to maintenance.

phases.name: Peak
phases.focus: Max volume at 50-55km. Race-specific workouts: long runs with race-pace segments, sharpening intervals. Final big long run of 21km.
phases.notes: Two quality sessions per week. Long run peaks at 21km with race-pace finish. Strength: 1-2 lighter sessions.

phases.name: Taper
phases.focus: Reduce volume ~30-50% while maintaining intensity. Fresh legs for race day.
phases.notes: Keep one short sharp session midweek. Final long run 13-14km. Drop strength to 1x light session.

phases.name: Race
phases.focus: Short easy runs, rest, and race day. Sub-1:45 target at 4:58/km.
phases.notes: Tue: 6km easy with 4×100m strides. Thu: 4km shakeout. Sun Oct 4: RACE DAY.

calls.name: set_weekly_plan

args.summary: Base phase week 1 — establish routine at 42km with one threshold session, long run, and two strength days.

days.title: Rest day
days.detail: Full rest. Let the legs recover from Sunday's long run.

days.title: Easy 8km
days.detail: 8km easy at conversational pace (~5:40-5:50/km). Keep HR in Z2.

days.title: Upper body — push/pull focus
days.detail: Bench press, rows, overhead press, pull-ups, core work. RPE 7-8. No lower-body loading so you're fresh for Thursday's threshold session.

days.title: 5×1km threshold
days.detail: Warm up 2km easy, then 5×1km at threshold pace (~4:45/km) with 90s jog recovery. Cool down 2km. Total ~10km.

days.title: Recovery 6km
days.detail: 6km very easy recovery run (~5:50-6:00/km). Keep HR low, Z1-Z2. Flush out the legs.

days.title: Lower body — squat & hinge focus
days.detail: Back squats, Romanian deadlifts, lunges, calf raises, core. RPE 7-8. Placed Saturday so Sunday's long run is on fresh legs.

days.title: Long run 16km
days.detail: 16km steady at easy-to-moderate effort (~5:45-5:55/km). Keep HR mostly Z2. Practice fuelling if you plan to on race day.

calls.name: set_macro_plan

args.summary: 19-week 10K plan building from ~38km/week to a peak of ~55km. Three phases: Base (build volume + strength), Build (add race-specific work — VO2max intervals, longer tempos), Peak/Taper (sharpen, then freshen for Nov 8). Strength 2x/week maintained throughout, scheduled around key sessions.

phases.name: Base
phases.focus: Build aerobic endurance and durability. Increase long run to 18-20km, add a second quality day (strides/hills), grow volume to ~48km.

phases.name: Build
phases.focus: Race-specific work: VO2max intervals (800m-1km repeats at 4:30-4:40/km), longer threshold blocks (3×2km, 20-min tempo), peak volume ~55km.

phases.name: Peak
phases.focus: Sharpen with faster intervals (400m-600m at 4:15-4:25/km), race-pace simulations, maintain threshold. Begin reducing volume.

phases.name: Taper
phases.focus: Reduce volume ~40%, keep intensity but cut reps. Short race-pace tune-up midweek. Fresh legs for race day.

phases.name: Race
phases.focus: Race day — sub-50 10K.

calls.name: set_weekly_plan

args.summary: Base phase week 1 — start building volume gently, introduce strides, maintain 2x strength.

days.title: Easy 7km
days.detail: Easy run at conversational pace (~5:50-6:10/km). Keep HR in Z1-Z2.

days.title: Upper body — push/pull focus
days.detail: Bench press, rows, overhead press, pull-ups, core. RPE 7-8.

days.title: Easy 8km + 6×20s strides
days.detail: Easy 8km at ~5:40-5:50/km. After the run, do 6×20-second strides at ~4:30/km with 60s walking recovery. Strides are relaxed fast running, not all-out.

days.title: Threshold: 5×1km @ 4:45/km
days.detail: Warm up 2km easy, then 5×1km at threshold pace (~4:45/km) with 90s jog recovery. Cool down 2km. Total ~10km.

days.title: Lower body — squat/deadlift focus
days.detail: Squats, Romanian deadlifts, lunges, calf raises, core. RPE 7-8. Schedule this early enough that Saturday's long run has ~24h recovery.

days.title: Long run 17km
days.detail: Steady long run at easy pace (~5:50-6:10/km). Keep HR in Z1-Z2. Focus on time on feet, not pace.

days.title: Rest day
days.detail: Full rest or light walking only.
